body.title: Add LABEL and STOPIF to node_executor
body.result: LABEL+STOPIF added to node_executor.py. Index-based while loop for label jumps. 24 new tests. 730 total passing.
body.description: Add LABEL and STOPIF instructions to node_executor.py (D290, D291). LABEL: ["LABEL", "@name"] no-op marker, jump target for local branches. STOPIF: ["STOPIF", condition] conditional stop. Changes: (1) convert for-loop to index-based while-loop for backward jumps; (2) LABEL handler (no-op marker); (3) STOPIF handler (eval condition, stopped_by=STOPIF, break); (4) BRANCHIF: if target starts with @ scan cell for matching LABEL else set next_node; (5) update ExecutionResult.stopped_by values; (6) update docstring; (7) add tests. File: wild_igor/igor/cognition/node_executor.py. Inertia: LOW.
